sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23457" key="dapi/dion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δᾰπίδιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <gramGrp opt="n" TEIform="gramGrp"> <gram type="dim" opt="n" TEIform="gram">Dim. of</gram> </gramGrp> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δάπις,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0468.tlg001:1:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hipparch.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.3</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
